'''竏噐-l-s''' ('''kayalas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monetarize|monetarize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-l-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monetarize|monetarize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏噐-l-s
|-
! Lemma
| kayalas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyalas|thiyalas]] || [[word:jiyalas|jiyalas]] || [[word:shiyalas|shiyalas]] || [[word:kiyalas|kiyalas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyalas|thuthuyalas]] || [[word:jujuyalas|jujuyalas]] || [[word:shushuyalas|shushuyalas]] || [[word:kukuyalas|kukuyalas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyalas|thuyalas]] || [[word:juyalas|juyalas]] || [[word:shuyalas|shuyalas]] || [[word:kuyalas|kuyalas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyalas|thuyalas]] || [[word:juyalas|juyalas]] || [[word:shuyalas|shuyalas]] || [[word:kuyalas|kuyalas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyalas|theyalas]] || [[word:jeyalas|jeyalas]] || [[word:sheyalas|sheyalas]] || [[word:keyalas|keyalas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyalas|thothoyalas]] || [[word:jojoyalas|jojoyalas]] || [[word:shoshoyalas|shoshoyalas]] || [[word:kokoyalas|kokoyalas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyalas|thoyalas]] || [[word:joyalas|joyalas]] || [[word:shoyalas|shoyalas]] || [[word:koyalas|koyalas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyalas|thoyalas]] || [[word:joyalas|joyalas]] || [[word:shoyalas|shoyalas]] || [[word:koyalas|koyalas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦyalas|thﾃｦyalas]] || [[word:jﾃｦyalas|jﾃｦyalas]] || [[word:shﾃｦyalas|shﾃｦyalas]] || [[word:kﾃｦyalas|kﾃｦyalas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayalas|thathayalas]] || [[word:jajayalas|jajayalas]] || [[word:shashayalas|shashayalas]] || [[word:kakayalas|kakayalas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayalas|thayalas]] || [[word:jayalas|jayalas]] || [[word:shayalas|shayalas]] || [[word:kayalas|kayalas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayalas|thayalas]] || [[word:jayalas|jayalas]] || [[word:shayalas|shayalas]] || [[word:kayalas|kayalas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayalas|shayalas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayalas|goshayalas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayalas|gokishayalas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayalasnﾃｼ|shayalasnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayalasnknﾃｼ|goshayalasnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayalasnﾃｼ|gokishayalasnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayalashﾃｫ|shayalashﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayalasnkshﾃｫ|goshayalasnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayalashﾃｫ|gokishayalashﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayalasro|shayalasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayalasnkro|goshayalasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayalasro|gokishayalasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayalasmu|shayalasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayalasnkmu|goshayalasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayalasmu|gokishayalasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayalasher|shayalasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayalasnksher|goshayalasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayalasher|gokishayalasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayalasng|shayalasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayalasnkng|goshayalasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayalasng|gokishayalasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayalasya|shayalasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayalasnkya|goshayalasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayalasya|gokishayalasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayalasyam|shayalasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayalasnkyam|goshayalasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayalasyam|gokishayalasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayalasnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shayalasnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayalasnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshayalasnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayalasnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishayalasnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayalasnﾃｼro|shayalasnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayalasnknﾃｼro|goshayalasnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayalasnﾃｼro|gokishayalasnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayalasnﾃｼmu|shayalasnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayalasnknﾃｼmu|goshayalasnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayalasnﾃｼmu|gokishayalasnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayalashﾃｫnﾃｼ|shayalashﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayalasnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshayalasnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayalashﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishayalashﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayalashﾃｫro|shayalashﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayalasnkshﾃｫro|goshayalasnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayalashﾃｫro|gokishayalashﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayalashﾃｫmu|shayalashﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayalasnkshﾃｫmu|goshayalasnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayalashﾃｫmu|gokishayalashﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayalasronﾃｼ|shayalasronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayalasnkronﾃｼ|goshayalasnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayalasronﾃｼ|gokishayalasronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayalasroshﾃｫ|shayalasroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayalasnkroshﾃｫ|goshayalasnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayalasroshﾃｫ|gokishayalasroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayalasromu|shayalasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayalasnkromu|goshayalasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayalasromu|gokishayalasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayalasmunﾃｼ|shayalasmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayalasnkmunﾃｼ|goshayalasnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayalasmunﾃｼ|gokishayalasmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayalasmushﾃｫ|shayalasmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayalasnkmushﾃｫ|goshayalasnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayalasmushﾃｫ|gokishayalasmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayalasmuro|shayalasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayalasnkmuro|goshayalasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayalasmuro|gokishayalasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
